overview: PG Men's Health specializes in testosterone replacement therapy, erectile dysfunction treatment, and medical weight loss for men. Care is delivered by licensed medical providers using non-invasive, personalized protocols at locations in Tampa and Sarasota.
highlights: Acoustic Wave Therapy for erectile dysfunction (90% success rate)
Free comprehensive medical exam and consultation
Licensed medical providers specializing in men's health
targetAudience: Men throughout Florida experiencing low energy, erectile dysfunction, low testosterone, or weight gain seeking personalized medical care.
